message: docs(build): catch README + build.rs dependency contract up to Cargo.toml¥n¥nFollow-through for commit 1153331d (chore(deps): bump franken-agent-¥ndetection + collapse asupersync stack). That commit bumped the¥nCargo.toml pin but left two downstream records un-updated:¥n¥n- build.rs DependencyContract for franken-agent-detection still listed¥n  expected_rev = 88756ba9¥u2026. The build script checks the live¥n  Cargo.lock against this table and would fail with ¥
on a clean build. Bumped to 5b8c4a27ce7a503b8c63fb383e1b¥n  99ce8364f63a to match Cargo.toml.¥n¥n- README.md ¥

table still advertised the old revs¥n  across the whole dep graph.
